blurb:

Icy reflective steel walls greeted you only by the harsh shafts of light bleeding in through the bars of your cage. Trying to push up, you back slapped to more of the same, the confined cage not built to house you comfortably, or even for long, the only decoration a hard metal tube, mockingly dripping water like you were some overgrown pet…well, then again in a twisted way perhaps that was appropriate after all.

	Dully your memories swim to the surface, a scene of running bodies, of deep roars and giggles mixing with mocking moans and the feeble pleas as towering figures smashed through the pathetic shelter you and your companions had been in. It had been so long since you’d had a hot meal, a warm bed, and you were just starting to think that things were going to be alright! When you’d hear the first monstrous boom! The wall to your shelter caving inwards with a dull moan that shook you too your core! The whole building shuddering as you saw the thing pulling back, only to whimper at that fat equine manhood that was latterly fucking your sanctuary to ruin! The first pump making the walls shake those able, running, as the massive cock pulled back, even as figures began to rush along its meaty girth! Giants in their own right, bouncing down the pillar to pounce! Towering bodies four times the size of any of you landing with mocking moans one their prizes! Hungrily tearing off their clothes to feed their growing desires! Idly you recall making it to the door only for it to smash inwards, as a gigantic black paw thumped into your path! A dull chuckled jerking your eyes upwards in time to see a huge hand reaching for you before a cock the size of baseball bat swung down smashing into your cheek hard enough to send you sprawling!

A few thick drops of something warm splattering over your face, as vision blurred, and a mocking voice rumbled in your ears among the chaos all around! “Hmm, guess this one mine!” chuckled a voice as the world for you went dark! Stumbling to your feet you half crawl to the cage door, looking into the huge room beyond. A mirror mockingly placed just level with the wall of cages, so that you could see yourself…naked, and along the other sells already empty. Gazing at your own reflection you see the ebony stamped symbol above your cage door proudly declaring it a prime Sin Corp cage.

	As you look from it to your own reflection…you see…
